description_long: This is a single, vintage-style leather athletic shoe, likely a soccer or football cleat, with a weathered brown and black exterior. The upper is made of worn leather, featuring a traditional lace-up closure with visible eyelets and laces. The toe and sides show significant creasing and scuffing, indicating heavy use. The sole is equipped with several short, cylindrical studs, typical of cleats designed for traction on grass or dirt surfaces. The interior appears to have a fabric or synthetic insole, and the heel is reinforced for durability. The overall appearance suggests this shoe has seen extensive outdoor use and exposure to the elements.
description: A heavily worn brown leather athletic cleat with laces and multiple sole studs, showing significant scuffing and creasing.
description_view_0: Top-down view showing the laced closure, worn leather upper, and visible insole inside the shoe.
description_view_1: Angled side view highlighting the creased toe box, scuffed leather, and the full lace-up system.
description_view_2: Bottom view displaying the sole with multiple cylindrical studs and visible wear on the outsole.
description_view_3: Side and underside view emphasizing the curvature of the shoe, the placement of the studs, and the worn heel.
